title: IT Assurance Manager
description_raw:
KPMG Advisory are seeking an IT Assurance Manager for a contract engagement supporting a financial services client with IT internal audit and governance assurance. This role is engaged outside IR35.

The IT Assurance Manager will lead the technology assurance function, providing independent review of IT controls, cyber security posture, and digital transformation programme governance.

Key responsibilities:
- Design and execute IT assurance reviews across enterprise technology platforms (SAP, Salesforce, cloud infrastructure)
- Review IT general controls (ITGCs) and application controls for financial reporting systems
- Provide assurance over cyber security framework compliance (ISO 27001, NIST)
- Assess information security risk across the client's digital estate
- Coordinate with internal audit and the CISO office
- Report findings to the Audit Committee

Profile:
- CISA, CISM, or CISSP qualified
- 8+ years in IT audit, IT assurance, or information security management
- Strong knowledge of SAP controls or ERP systems
- Financial services sector background preferred

Rate: £700–£800/day outside IR35
Duration: 12 months
Start: 1 August 2026
Location: London (hybrid)
